Poison Wind Censer  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 28
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 115
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5
SV POISON: -30
Effect: Gale of Poison (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL SHD SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

This may not always be great for most situations, but it is a HUGE help when factioning for those classes who don't get/have not yet gotten an AE.

# Aug 21 2003 at 8:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786843326
2 posts
I just bought this in HhK for 65pp off of a shammy that was undoubtably hurting for cash. I obviously got the better end of the deal. I'm currently a lvl 24 shmmy. And most of you are right, great twinkie! Anyway. just wanted to say that I love it.

About the Effect
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2002 at 7:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592345654402
15 posts
The effect does damage the wielder of this weapon. With the -30 to poison, makes it harder to resist your own damage.

QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2002 at 2:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
150ft area; it's possible to not get hit by the 2nd/3rd wave if you back up a few.
▲ Page top
RE: About the Effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2003 at 8:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1692576997126
99 posts
This is a very nice weapon for my Shaman. Will not proc until level 50 so I don't have to worry about the poison AOE for a while (Level 35 atm). If I am not using my spear/shield combo - I use this to put some serious hurt on the mob. Add a FBSS, Quickness Spell, and Frenzy to the mix and U have a fast damage dealer for those times when U are duoing with your pet.

Reminds me of my Beastlord 's Adamantite Bo Stick. Procs a 3 wave firestorm that can inflict a total of 225dd on opponent and wielder. I used it for 10 levels (level 30 to 40) and was caught in the full storm only twice. I usually caught around 50dmg, while backing up, and my warder kept the aggro centered on him. Makes a very fast kill, with high dexterity, and the AOE proc is excellent when fighting mobs that like to run away or stay just out of arms reach (When U R tall, Vah Shir, everything looks too far away)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 18 2002 at 5:02 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i have on one the tunare server anyone want it i would like to sell cheap so send sealdar a tell

# Aug 07 2002 at 2:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362225629

Yes, I'm a slave to fashion. Well not quite but I am interested in what this looks like equipped. Does anyone have any idea?

Taniar Sanguine,
Revenant of Zenith
Brell

▲ Page top
its not bad actually
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2001 at 8:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761375335
1 post
Its actually a pretty good weapon if you are using ae tactics on a raid. Even with the -30 poison resist, if you get DMF and talisman of shadoo on you, you can get your PR well over 100. With PR that high, the weapon does very little damage to you.

Also, like stated, its a nice twink weapon.
▲ Page top
A suicidal weapon
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 3:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249190150
4 posts
With -30 poison resist, you are just gonna kill yourself when it procs. Plus, no one in the right mind would use a weapon that procs an AOE spell. You WILL GET YOUR WHOLE PARTY KILLED because AOE breaks chanter's mezzes.
▲ Page top
RE: A suicidal weapon
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2003 at 9:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752538177
View User Forum
186 posts
BAH HUMBUG! I like Wolveran's post, thank you. I want to add one more sugestion. Even when you are fighting mobs that aren't large enough so that you don't get hit, it is often feasible to take a step back after the 1st round of the proc hits you (or you resist it) thereby removing you from the AE radius -- but not the mob you are fighting. As Wolveran stated, this is certainly a situational type of strategy, but potentially a highly worthwhile one. This may even be feasible in a group setting if either your absense for aproximatly 17 seconds from the melee situation is non-significant or you are MT and have created an agro level that causes the mob to follow you the one or two steps and continues to be engaged with you.

BTW: I'm using this to twink my froggie cleric and he's a melee monster with it.

Edited, Thu Sep 11 22:02:29 2003
▲ Page top
RE: A suicidal weapon
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2002 at 9:29 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591774066779
Scholar
103 posts
Only a suicidal weapon if you have someone mezzing. In a perfect Norrath I guess there would be an Enchanter/Bard in every group, but alas, Norrath ain't perfect. I just got out of a group in Karnors that broke down like this...
52Warr(MA) 53Monk 51Monk 52Cleric 54 Ranger (Me) 51Pally, grouped up in the DogTower(Captain spawn area). Adds were all Tanked Down, or root parked. Made me wish i hadn't sold my sword of skyfire 5 levels ago. AoE Proc weapons are situational, no doubt about that, but add an interesting new edge to the groups you join. If you are a MT type tank class, aoe procs can ensure that you keep the aggro even on adds. If you're not a MT style fighter (hense me being a ranger) they help you refine your abilities to check your aggro, and help you to learn distancing (Many a forest giant was soloed with my Sword of Skyfire <3waves of 56 Aoe rain proc> with me never getting hit by the proc).

Aoe Weapons are powerful, in the right situation, in others they can be very deathly to you and your party. If you prefer to be one of those "turn on autoattack and watch the TV" melee types, then enjoy boring yourself to death while grinding exp. If you like to keep throwing new twists into the mix, pick up a Skyfire, or a Poison wind censor, and the next time the situation allows it, experiment(just not on a raid for gods sake ;)

Wolveran Shadowbane
54.1 <Dang this stupid level is killing me> Pathfinder
▲ Page top
RE: A suicidal weapon
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 4:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755689526
115 posts
With a good Dex buff and resist poison buff to counter the neg30 debuff, a good cleric (maybe two), and no enchanter or bard available for crowd control, you could take out and keep agro on three or four mobs if this procs often enough. Definitely a situational weapon and one you'll only use in a single specific situation in your entire EQ life...but its only suicidal if you make it your main 2hb
▲ Page top
RE: A suicidal weapon

QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2002 at 11:23 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245696804

Bah, let him use it. Not everyone can take this game seriously all the time. Its perfectly ok to go insane sometimes. Just accept that it happens sometimes and that person is just trying to have fun.

Delith
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 10 2002 at 3:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well people who are going to have fun like that should do it elsewhere. No one likes to die in high lvl places and have a CR take forever. You must realize, although this spell can deal out some damage you can't enter an HP war of attrition with an NPC, they simply will always have way more HP than you.
nice
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2001 at 6:27 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Since it procs at 50 it would be a nice twink item.
▲ Page top
RE: nice
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2003 at 9:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784541718
View User Forum
57 posts
this is a killer twink weapon. i just bought it for my 5th Shaman (ok sooner or later i gotta find one i like). i am a 24 troll witchdoctor on lanys, anyway, i was doing ok with a Slime Coated Harpoon and a Sporestrand Shield (for mana) while hunting fiends in Paludal. then i heard about this thing. sold all my low level twink gear at bazaar over the last weekend and even sold my Dark Reaver (yeah i had a sk too) to a vender for 9pp (ouch). yep all told i paid 700pp for it and it is worth every penny. i smack bandits for 40-43 each and with 28 delay i hit hard and fast. add in an Affliction and they are down quick and i dont need no stinkin group. all hail Bautox, the pretty one. i can now solo whites and yellows again. a root rot and then smash and bash and i'm lootin your funky sweaty blood dreched corpse. anyhow it's all fun and games now. we'll see what happens when i get to 50 and have to dodge the poison waves. till then, the XP train continues.
▲ Page top
RE: nice
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2003 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784541718
View User Forum
57 posts
just an update. just dinged 30 and with quickness, tagars insects, and a dose of envenomed breath, I solo Everything. i average hit for 46 (high was 56) and i usually get off at least 2 shots for every hit i take. bear form and regen help too. i am GOD with this thing only problem is my poison resist is at -5 (who cares.)
▲ Page top
RE: nice
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2003 at 8:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784541718
View User Forum
57 posts
Still stompin the guts out of mobs, but noticing that they hit much harder now at 34. btw Shammy pet does suck(in case you didn't know). Finding that a shaman with wis of 119 is not a shaman at all - it's a BeastLord without a chance. anyhow got my wis up to 151 and finding that at 34 i dont want to use this thing anymore. considering getting a tarnished driveshaft +wis and +sv vs poison and + ac. not as fast but does hit harder. i still get off shots for 62 with the censer though. great for finishing giant scouts in GD. we'll see how it goes. can't wait till epic. DEFINITELY wont be using this thing at 50 when it procs but i'll try to eek out a few more levels will i get the 450pp for the driveshaft. working on armor upgrades now.
